title: Canyon Ridge Townhouse
definition: Canyon Ridge townhouse modeling shows about +$1,200/month — stronger net in this scenario due to gross vs fee balance.

not_ideal_for: Buyers assuming passive income with zero oversight

faq.a: Not always — it depends on price, financing, and actual fees; this is one modeled case.
Higher rates, fee spikes, or occupancy dips of even a few points.
Compare to downtown and Solara analyses and run your own inputs in the calculator.
